message:
feat(zig): enhance encoding, GPU hash table, and metal0 JIT

Encoding improvements:
- writer.zig: Add protobuf schema encoding, proper Lance metadata format
- arrow_ipc.zig: Fix optional field handling for column types and buffers
- orc.zig, rle.zig, zlib.zig: Improve ORC format decoding

New features:
- hash_table.zig: Add GPU-accelerated hash table for GROUP BY operations
- gpu_group_by.zig: Fix MIN/MAX aggregation updates, add batch support

metal0 JIT:
- Refactor to use subprocess compilation architecture
- Add proper schema extraction and type conversion
